articles.title: First round of US-Iran talks ends with encouraging progress, mediators say
articles.description: The US-Iran talks began on Sunday in Switzerland, after last week's agreement, which includes a commitment to reach a final deal within 60 days.

articles.title: Paedophile nursery worker could have been stopped sooner, says former colleague
articles.description: Staff member who raised concerns about nursery worker Nathan Bennett was "ignored" for months.

articles.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
articles.description: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

articles.title: Hero ticket inspector hurt in crash helped others
articles.description: A passenger praises a member of railway staff who, despite being in pain, helped the injured.
